source_texts: "자네가 우리더러 미안허달 게 뭐 있나? 그야말루 진날 개 사위 꼴을 허구 나왔어두 자네장 가드는 데 배행 나온 셈만 치면 좋지 않은가?"
건배는 동혁의 말을 얼른 채뜨려 가지고, 이번에는 빗대어 놓고 놀려 댄다.
하고 동혁은 눈을 슬적 흘기면서도, 어쩐지 건배의 놀리는 말이 그다지 듣기 싫지는 않았다.
바람결에 통통통통 하는 소리가 바위에 철썩철썩 부딪히는 파도 소리에 섞여 차츰차츰 가까이 들려 왔다. 조금 있자, ' 뛰 ― 잇.’
새된 기적 소리는 동혁의 가슴속까지 찌르르하도록 울렸다.
이윽고 파아란 뼁끼칠을 한 똑딱이가 선체를 들까불며 들어온다. 갑판 위에서 손수건을 흔드는 흰 저고리에 검정 치마가 보인다. 동혁은 손을 높직이 들며 허공을 저었다.
조그만 거루는 선객과 짐을 받아 싣고 선창으로 들어와 닿았다. 동혁은 반가운 웃음을 얼굴 가득히 담고 영신의 손을 잡아 뭍으로 끌어올렸다.
"잘 오구말구요. 그래 그 동안 얼마나 고생을 허셨에요?"
하며 동혁은 영신의 얼굴빛을 살핀다. 상상하던 것보다는 나아도, 어글어글하던 눈이 전보다 더 커다래 보이는 것은, 그 복성스럽던 얼굴의 살이 그만큼 빠진 탓일 듯. 그러나 반가운 김에 상기가 되어 그런지 혈색은 그다지 나쁘지 않은 것을 보고 위선 안심을 하였다.

- source: 하다가 영신이가 무어라고 질문을 할 기세를 보이니까 동혁은,
  target: Just as Yeongsin seemed about to ask a question, Donghyeok said,
- source: "종교 문제 같은 건 우리 뒀다가 토론허십시다. 그버덤 더 중요헌 얘기가 있으니까요."
  target: "Let us leave religious matters to discuss later. There are more important things to talk about."
- source: 하고 손을 들어 미리 영신의 말문을 막아 버렸다. 그러고는 눈을 딱 감고 한참이나 이슬에 젖은 숲속의 벌레 소리를 듣고 있더니,
  target: he said, raising his hand to block Yeongsin's words in advance. Then, closing his eyes tightly, he listened for a long while to the sounds of insects in the forest damp with dew, before saying,
- source: "나는 이런 생각을 하구 있에요."
  target: "I have been thinking this."
- source: 하고 응성깊은 목소리로 말을 꺼낸다.
  target: he began to speak in a resonant voice. "Although I was deeply impressed by what you said at the reception gathering, I was born in the countryside, and though I have been away for several years, now that I have gone directly into the rural villages, I see that their living conditions are truly beyond words. They are several times more miserable than what is talked about in newspapers or magazines."
- source: "간담회 석상에서 영신 씨가 허신 말씀을 듣구 감복을 했지만, 내가 농촌의 태생이면 서두 여러 해 나와 있다가 직접 농촌 속으루 들어가 보니까, 참말 그네들의 사는 형편이 말씀이 아니에요. 신문이나 잡지에서 떠드는 것버덤 몇 곱절 비참하거든요."
  target: Having said this, he paused for a long while, swallowed dryly, and then, as if he had made up his mind long ago, said,
- source: 하고 한참이나 뜸을 들이다가 마른침을 삼키더니 오래 전부터 각오를 하고 있었던 것처럼,
  target: "I want to voluntarily withdraw from school."
- source: "난 자진해서 학교를 퇴학허고 싶어요."
  target: he said, and once again fell into thought. Yeongsin, who had been listening intently to Donghyeok's words while gazing at the fireflies flickering in the forest, suddenly lifted her face and said,
- source: 하고는 다시금 생각에 잠긴다. 숲속에서 반득이는 반딧불을 들여다보며 동혁의 말에 귀를 기울이고 있던 영신은 얼굴을 번쩍 들며,
  target: Having said this, she fell into thought once more. Yeongsin, who had been listening intently to Donghyeok's words while gazing at the fireflies flickering in the forest, suddenly lifted her face and said,
- source: "왜요? 일년 반만 더 댕기시면 졸업을 허실 텐데요?"
  target: "Why? You could graduate if you attend for just another year and a half."
- source: 하고 놀라운 듯 눈을 크게 뜬다.
  target: she said, widening her eyes in surprise.
- source: "고만둘 수밖에 없어요. 중학교 때엔 억지를 쓰구 별별 짓을 다 해가면서 고학을 했지만, 나 하나 공부를 시키느라구 아버지는 올봄까지 대대루 내려오던 집 앞 논까지 거진 다 팔으셨에요. 졸업만 하면 큰 수가 날 줄 알구 계량할 것두 아니 남기신 모양인데, 내가 졸업이라 구 헌댔자 바루 취직두 허기 어렵지만, 무슨 기수(技手)라는 명색이 붙대야 월급이라 군 고작 사오십 원밖에 안 될 테니, 그걸 가지구 객지에서 물 밥 사먹어 가며, 양복 해 입구  소위 교제비까지 써가면서 수다 식구를 먹여 살릴 수가 있겠어요? 되레 빚만 지게 되지요.
  target: "I have no choice but to quit. During middle school, I forced my way through and did all sorts of things to put myself through school, but to educate just me, my father has sold off nearly all the rice paddies in front of our house that had been passed down through generations, right up until this spring. He seemed to think that once I graduated, a great fortune would come, so he didn't even leave enough for funeral expenses. But even if I do graduate, it will be difficult to find immediate employment, and even if I get a position with the title of 'technician,' my salary would be a mere forty or fifty won. With that, do you think I can support my large family while living away from home, buying rice and water, tailoring Western suits, and spending what is called 'social expenses'? I would only end up in debt.
- source: 그러니까 나머지 땅마지기나 밭날갈이를 깡그리 팔어 없애구서 거산을 허게 되기 전에 하루바삐 집으루 돌아가서 넘어진 기둥을 버티고 다시 일으켜 세울 도리를 차려야겠에요. 까딱 허면 굶어 죽게 될 형편이니까요."
  target: "Therefore, before selling off the remaining plots of land and fields entirely and becoming completely destitute, I must hurry back home to find a way to support the fallen pillar and raise it up again. If I am not careful, we are in a situation where we could starve to death."
- source: "……"
  target: "..."
- source: 영신은 동혁이의 사정도 딱하거니와, 그만 못지않게 말이 아닌 저의 집의 형편을 생각 하느라고 말대답도 아니 하고 있다가 한참 만에야 한숨을 섞어,
  target: Yeongsin felt pity for Donghyeok's situation, but thinking of her own family's circumstances, which were no less dire, she remained silent without even replying. After a long while, mixing her words with a sigh, she said,
- source: "제 사정은 백선생밖에는 아무헌테두 말한 적이 없어요. 홀로 되신 우리 어머니는 육십 노인이 딸 하나 공부를 시키느라구 입때 생선 광주리를 이고 댕기세요. 올 여름엔 더위를 잡숫고 길바닥에 가 쓰러지신 걸, 동네 사람들이 업어다가 눕혀 드렸어요. 그렇건만 약 한 첩변 변히……."
  target: "I have never told my situation to anyone except Mr. Baek. My mother, who is alone, is a sixty-year-old woman who still carries a basket of fish on her head to support her daughter's education. This summer, she suffered from the heat and collapsed on the street; neighbors had to carry her home and lay her down. Yet, she could not even afford a single dose of medicine..."
- source: 그는 고만 목이 메었다가 간신히 입술을 떨며,
  target: Her voice choked up, and trembling her lips with difficulty, she continued,
- source: "정신을 잃으신 동안에 어느 몹쓸놈이 푼푼이 모아 넣으신 돈주머니를 끌러 가서 그게 원통 해 밤새두룩 우시는데……!"
  target: "While she was unconscious, some wretched fellow untied the money pouch she had saved penny by penny and stole it. She was so aggrieved that she cried all night long...!"
- source: 하고 영신은 가슴속으로부터 치밀어 오는 울음을 참느라고 잇자국이 나도록 손가락을 깨문다.
  target: Having said this, Yeongsin bit her fingers until they left marks to hold back the tears welling up from deep within her chest.
- source: 동혁은 몹시 우울해졌다. 가슴이 턱 막힌 듯이 갑갑해서 더운 입김을 후― 하고 내뿜는다.
  target: Donghyeok became deeply depressed. His chest felt as if it were tightly blocked, so he exhaled a warm breath with a 'Hoo—'.
- source: 숲속의 버러지 소리도, 바위 틈으로 졸졸졸 흘러내리는 샘물 소리도 두 사람의 귀에는 들리지 않는 듯 동혁은, ' 내가 공연히 그런 소리를 끄집어냈구나.’
  target: As if the sounds of insects in the forest and the trickling of spring water flowing through rock crevices were inaudible to their ears, Donghyeok thought, 'I have unnecessarily brought up such matters.'
- source: 하고 바로 정수리 위에서 황금빛으로 반짝이며 내려다보는 유난히 큰 별을 원망스러이 쳐다보다가 영신의 앞으로 다가앉으며,
  target: Having said this, he resentfully gazed up at an unusually large star shining with golden light directly above his head, then moved to sit in front of Yeongsin and said,
- source: "자, 우린 그런 생각은 고만 허십시다. 어쨌든 우리는 명색 전문학교까지 댕겨 보니까, 여간 행복된 사람들이 아니지요."
  target: "Come, let us put aside such thoughts. In any case, since we have at least attended a specialized school, we are quite fortunate people."
- source: 하고 목소리 부드러이 영신을 위로한다.
  target: he said, softly comforting Yeongsin.
- source: "참말 공부니 뭐니 다 집어치구 시굴루 내려가야겠어요. 공부를 한다는 핑계로 서울 와 서나 혼자 편안히 지내는 게 어머니께나 동리 사람들한테까지 큰 죄를 짓는 것 같어요. 첨엔 멋도 모르구서 무슨 성공을 허구야 내려간다고 하나님께 맹세꺼정 허구 올라왔지만 요…… 더군다나 아까 백선생 댁에서 허신 말씀을 듣구, 이제까지 지내 온 걸 여간 뉘우치지 않었어요."
  target: "Indeed, I should abandon all this studying and whatnot and go down to the countryside. It feels like a great sin against my mother and even the villagers to remain here in Seoul, living comfortably alone under the pretext of studying. At first, without knowing better, I even made a vow to God that I would only return after achieving some success... Moreover, after hearing what Mr. Baek said earlier at his house, I deeply regret how I have lived until now."
- source: 그 말을 듣자 동혁은 벌떡 일어섰다. 양복 바지에다가 두 손을 찌르고 거진 궐련 한 개를 태울 동안이나 왔다갔다하며 무슨 생각에 잠겼다가 영신의 앞으로 다가서며,
  target: Upon hearing these words, Donghyeok jumped to his feet. With both hands thrust into his suit pants, he paced back and forth for nearly the time it would take to smoke one cigarette, lost in thought, before approaching Yeongsin and saying,
- source: "영 신 씨!"
  target: "Ms. Yeongsin!"
- source: 하고 힘차게 부른다.
  target: he called out vigorously.
- source: "우리 둘이 이렇게 만나서 한 십 년이나 사귄 동지처럼 가슴을 터놓구 하룻밤을 새운 기념을 우리 영원히 남기십시다."
  target: "Let us make this night we have spent together, opening our hearts like comrades who have known each other for ten years, a memory that will last forever."
- source: 하고 중대한 동의를 한다.
  target: he said, making a solemn proposal.
- source: "어떻게요?"
  target: "How so?"
- source: 영신의 눈은 별빛에 새파랗게 빛난다. 동혁은 버썩 대들어 그 소댕 같은 손으로 서슴지 않  고 여자의 두 손을 덥석 잡으며,
  target: Yeongsin's eyes shone blue in the starlight. Donghyeok boldly stepped forward and, without hesitation, firmly grasped the woman's two hands with his large, calloused hands, saying,
- source: "우리 시굴루 내려갑시다! 이번 기회에 공부구 뭐구 다 집어치우구서 우리의 고향을 지키러 내려갑시다! 한 가정을 붙든다느니버덤두 다 쓰러져 가는 우리의 고향을 붙들기 위 한 운동을 일으키기 위해서, 자 용기를 냅시다! 그네들을 위해서 일을 허다가 죽는 한이 있드래두 선구자로서의 기쁨과 자랑만은 남겠지요."
  target: "Let us go down to our countryside! Let us abandon our studies and everything else on this occasion and go down to defend our homeland! To launch a movement to hold fast to our collapsing homeland rather than merely holding onto a single family, come, let us summon our courage! Even if we die while working for their sake, we will at least leave behind the joy and pride of being pioneers."
- source: 영신이가 무엇에 아찔하게 취한 듯이 눈을 내리감고 있는 것은 불시에 두방망이질을 하는 심장의 고동을 진정하려 함이다. 그는 마주 일어서서 동혁에게 으스러지도록 잡힌 두 손에 힘을 주며,
  target: Yeongsin closed her eyes as if dizzy with intoxication, trying to calm the pounding of her heart, which was suddenly beating like two mallets. She stood up to face him, pressing strength into her two hands, which Donghyeok held so tightly they felt as if they would crush.
- source: "고맙습니다! 당신 같으신 동지를 얻게 해주신 하나님께 감사합니다."
  target: "Thank you! I thank God for granting me a comrade like you."
- source: 영신은 더 길게 말하지 않았다. 어느덧 인왕산 너머로 기울어 가는 달빛 아래서 두 남녀의 마주 쏘아보는 네 줄기 시선은 비상한 결심에 빛나고 있었다.
  target: Yeongsin spoke no further. Beneath the moonlight already inclining beyond Inwang Mountain, the four lines of sight from the man and woman gazing at each other shone with an extraordinary resolve.
- source: 일적천금(一滴千金)
  target: A single drop is worth a thousand gold.
- source: 날이 가물어서 동리마다 소동이 대단하다. 정월 대보름날은 하루 종일 진눈깨비가 휘 뿌려서 송아지 한 마리를 태우는 윷놀이판에 헤살을 놓았었고, 모처럼 풍물을 차리고 나선 두레 꾼들을 찬비 맞은 족제비 꼴을 만들더니, 그 뒤로 석 달째 접어든 오늘까지 비 한 방울 구경을 못 하였다.
  target: The drought has caused great commotion in every village. On the day of the Daeboreum full moon in the first lunar month, sleet sprayed all day long, ruining the yutnori board where a calf was being wagered, and turning the farmers who had set out with their pungmul instruments for the first time in ages into the likeness of weasels drenched in cold rain. Yet from then until today, as the third month begins, not a single drop of rain has been seen.
- source: "허어 이 날, 사람을 잡으려구 이렇게 가무는 게여."
  target: "Heavens, is the sky trying to kill people by drying up like this?"
- source: 바싹 마른 흙이 먼지처럼 피어올라 폴삭폴삭 날리는 보리밭에 붓을 주던 박첨지는, 기신 없이 괭이질을 하던 손을 쉬고 허리를 펴며 혼자말로 탄식을 한다. 그는 검버섯이 돋은 이마에 주름살을 잡으며 머리 위를 우러러본다. 그러나 가을날처럼 새파란 하늘에는 구름 한 점 찾아 낼 수가 없다. 바닷가의 메마른 농촌에 바람만 진종일 씽씽 불어서 콧구멍이 막히고 목의 침이 말라드는 것 같다.
  target: While hoeing the barley field, where the parched soil rose like dust and fluttered about, Park Cheom-ji stopped his lifeless hoeing, straightened his back, and sighed to himself. Wrinkling his forehead, spotted with age marks, he looked up at the sky. However, not a single cloud could be found in the blue sky, clear as an autumn day. In this arid coastal farming village, only the wind blew briskly all day long, making it feel as though his nostrils were blocked and the saliva in his throat dried up.
- source: "이런 제에기, 보리싹이 연골에 말러 배틀어지니 올 여름엔 냉수만 마시구 산담메."
  target: "Damn it all, the barley sprouts are drying up while still tender and turning white; this summer, we'll have to live drinking only cold water."
- source: 늙은이는 다시 한번 말과 한숨을 뒤섞어 내뿜고는, 이제야 겨우 강아지풀 잎사귀만하게 꼬리를 흔드는 보리싹을 짚신발로 걷어찬다. 그러다가 화풀이로 쌈지를 긁어 희연 부스러기한 대를 태워 물고 빼끔빼끔 빨다가 괭이 자루에 탁탁 털어 버린다.
  target: The old man exhaled once more, mixing words with a sigh, and then kicked at the barley sprouts, which were finally wagging their tails only as large as foxtail leaves, with his straw-sandaled foot. Then, in a fit of anger, he scratched his tobacco pouch, lit some crushed tobacco stems, took a few puffs, and knocked the ashes off against the handle of his hoe.
- source: 그는 한참 동안이나 멍하니 섰다가 그래도 하는 수 없다는 듯이 멍에같이 굽은 허리를 주먹으로 두어 번 두드린 뒤에, 손바닥에다 침을 튀튀 뱉더니 다시 괭이를 잡는다.
  target: He stood blankly for quite some time, but then, as if resigned to the fact that there was nothing else to be done, he struck his yoke-like bent back a couple of times with his fist, spat copiously into his palm, and grabbed the hoe again.
- source: "참 정말 큰일났구려. 참죽나무에 순이 나는 걸 보니깐 못자리 헐 때두 지냈는데, 비 한 방울이나 구경을 해야 허지 않소."
  target: "Truly, we are in great trouble. Seeing the shoots on the ailanthus tree, the time for preparing the seedbeds has already passed; we must at least see a single drop of rain."
- source: 곁두리 때가 훨씬 지나도록 바닷가에서 갯줄나물을 캐어 가지고 들어온 마누라가 영감의 등뒤에서 반나마 기운 광주리를 던지고, 기신없이 밭두덕에 가 주저앉으며 하는 말이다.
  target: It was well past the time for making kimchi, yet his wife, who had been out gathering sea mustard along the coast, threw down a basket that was barely half full behind her husband's back and collapsed wearily onto the field ridge, speaking these words.
- source: 앞니가 몽땅 함몰을 해서, 동리 계집애들은 그를 합죽할머니라고 놀린다.
  target: Because all her front teeth had sunken in, the village girls teased her, calling her Grandmother Hapjuk.
- source: "그러게 말요. 이대루 가물다간 기미(己未)년처럼 기우제를 지낸다구 떠들겠는걸."
  target: "That's right. If this drought continues, they'll be talking about holding a rain prayer ceremony just like in the Giho year."
- source: 박첨지는 마누라를 흘깃 돌려다보고 중얼중얼 군소리하듯 한다.
  target: Park Cheomji glanced sideways at his wife and muttered as if complaining to himself.
- source: "너구리굴 보구 피물돈버텀 내쓴다구 동혁이 월급 탈 때만 바라구서 조합 돈꺼정 써놨으니, 참 정말 입맛이 소태 같구려."
  target: "They say we spent the money meant for cleaning out the raccoon den just waiting for Donghyeok's monthly salary, and even used up the cooperative funds. Truly, my taste is as bitter as gall."
- source: 영감의 말을 한숨으로 화답하던 마누라는,
  target: His wife, who had responded to her husband's words with a sigh, said,
- source: "그래두 동혁이가 어떡허든지 우리 양주 배야 곯게 하겠수?"
  target: "Still, no matter what happens, Donghyeok wouldn't let our bellies starve, would he?"
- source: "명색이라두 학교 졸업이나 했으면 모를까, 지금 와서 전들 무슨 뾰죽헌 수가 있나베. 양식이라 구 인젠 묵은 보리 여남은 말이 달랑달랑허는데……."
  target: "If he had at least graduated from school, it would be one thing, but what clever solution could he possibly find now? We have only about eight mal of old barley left for our grain supply, hanging by a thread..."
- source: "아무튼 그 자식이 우리집 기둥인데 조석 때마다 동리 일만 헌다구 몰아세질랑 마슈. 그렇게 성화를 헌다구 말을 들을 듯싶우? 제가 허구 싶어서 허는 노릇을. 목이 말러두 주막에가 서 탁배기 한잔 입에 대지 않는 자식을 가지구서……."
  target: "In any case, don't keep nagging that boy, who is the pillar of our house, saying he only does village work morning and night. Do you think he would listen if you pestered him like that? He does it because he wants to. Think of a son who won't even touch a drop of makgeolli at the tavern even when his throat is parched..."
- source: "글쎄, 오늘두 여태 안 들어오는 걸 좀 보우. 아비가 올버텀은 일이 심에 부쳐서 당최 꿈지럭 거리 질 못하는 줄 뻔히 알면서 나댕기기만 허니 말이지."
  target: "Well, just look at him; he still hasn't come home today. He knows full well that his father is so exhausted from work in the fields that he can't even move, yet he just keeps wandering around."
- source: "그래두 저 딴엔 동네에 유조헌 일을 헌답시구, 밥도 제때에 못 먹구 돌아댕기는 게 난 가엾어 못 보겠습디다."
  target: "Still, in his own way, he says he's doing something beneficial for the village, and it breaks my heart to see him wandering about without even eating his meals on time."
- source: "아무튼 그놈의 농우횐가 강습횐가 허는 것버텀 없애 버려야 해. 동혁이 초사에 동리 젊은 녀석들은 한 놈이나 집에 붙어 있어야지. 밤낮 몰려댕기며 역적 모의허듯 쑥덕공론만 허니 밥이 생기나 옷이 생기나."
  target: "In any case, we must get rid of that so-called Farmers' Union or Study Group. At least one of the young fellows in the village should be home during Donghyeok's night watch. Will rice or clothes appear just because they gather day and night, plotting like traitors and whispering conspiracies?"
- source: 박첨지는 혀를 끌끌 차며 젊은 사람들을 꾸짖고 마누라는 아들의 두둔을 하느라고 어느덧 땅거미 지는 줄을 모른다.
  target: Park Cheomji clicked his tongue in disapproval as he scolded the young people, while his wife, busy defending her son, failed to notice that twilight was already falling.
- source: 맷방석만한 시뻘건 해는 맞은편 잿배기를 타고 넘는다.
  target: The crimson sun, as large as a straw mat, crossed over the ash-gray hill opposite.
- source: "저 해를 좀 보슈. 가물지 않겠나."
  target: "Just look at that sun. Won't there be a drought?"
- source: 한쪽을 찌긋한 마누라의 눈에는 흉년이 들 조짐이 보이는 듯하다. 그는 유심히 서녘 하늘을 바라다보다가,
  target: In the wife's half-closed eyes, there seemed to appear signs of a poor harvest. She gazed intently at the western sky, and then,
- source: "아, 저어기 동혁이가 오는구려!"
  target: "Ah, there comes Donghyeok!"
- source: 하고 아들의 그림자를 몇 해 만에야 발견하듯 가벼이 부르짖으며 무릎을 짚고 일어선다.
  target: she exclaimed lightly, as if discovering her son's shadow after several years, and rose, supporting herself on her knees.
- source: 박첨지 양주의 눈이 부시도록 넘어가는 석양을 등뒤에 받으면서 잿배기를 넘어오는 동혁의 윤곽은 점점 뚜렷이 나타났다. 회색 저고리 바지에 검정 조끼를 입고 삽을 둘러멘 동 혁이는 역광선에 원체 건장한 체격이 더한층 걸대가 커 보인다. 아들이 가까이 오자,
  target: With the dazzling setting sun behind him, Donghyeok's silhouette became increasingly distinct as he crossed the ash-gray hill. Wearing gray jacket and pants with a black vest and carrying a shovel over his shoulder, Donghyeok's already sturdy physique appeared even taller against the backlight. As his son approached,
- source: "점심두 안 들어와 먹구 여태 어디서 뭣들을 했니?"
  target: "You didn't even come in for lunch; where have you been and what have you been doing all this time?"
- source: 하고 묻는 아버지의 목소리는 아까 꾸짖던 때와는 딴판으로 부드럽다.
  target: his father's voice, as he asked, was utterly different from when he had been scolding earlier—it was soft.
- source: "공동답(共同畓) 못자릴 허려구 물을 푸는데 쌈들이 나서 입때꺼정 뜯어말리구 왔에요."
  target: "We were drawing water to prepare the seedbed for the communal paddy, but a fight broke out, and I spent all this time trying to stop it."
- source: "넌 집의 못자린 헐 생각두 않구, 공동답에만 매달리면 어떡허잔 말이냐?"
  target: "You don't even think about preparing the seedbed for our own house, and if you only devote yourself to the communal paddy, what are we supposed to do?"
- source: 아버지의 나무라는 말에 동혁은,
  target: At his father's rebuke, Donghyeok replied,
- source: "차차 허지요. 물 푸는 게 서툴르니까 어떻게 심이 드는지…… 두렁 밑을 파는 데두 논바닥이 바싹 말러서 세상 가래를 받어야지요."
  target: "We'll manage in time. Since you're unskilled at drawing water, how could you possibly have the strength?... And when digging below the ridge, the paddy floor is so dry that it requires the strength of a dozen men."
- source: 하고 집으로 들어가 세수를 하고 발을 씻고 제 방으로 들어가더니, 기직자리 위에 가 턱 눕는다. 누웠다느니보다도 진종일 삐친 팔다리를 쭈욱 뻗고 지쳐 늘어진 것이다. 산울 밖에서 걸귀가 꿀꿀거리는 소리가 들리건만, 꼼짝도 할 수가 없어서 누워 있노라니,
  target: Having said this, he went into the house, washed his face and feet, entered his own room, and collapsed face-down onto the straw mat. It was less that he lay down than that he simply stretched out his limbs, strained all day long, and let his exhausted body go limp. Though he could hear a pig grunting outside the mountain hedge, he was unable to move a muscle and lay there when,
- source: "저녁 먹어라."
  target: "Eat your dinner."
- source: 하는 어머니의 목소리와 함께 된장찌개 냄새가 허기가 지도록 시장하던 동혁의 코에 맡혔다. 장물을 찔금 친 갯줄나물과 짠지쪽이 반찬이다.
  target: Along with his mother's voice, the smell of soybean paste stew reached Donghyeok's nose, making him acutely aware of his hunger. The side dishes were sea mustard seasoned with a splash of soybean paste broth and slices of salted radish.
- source: "동화는 그저 안 들어왔에요? 들어오건 같이 먹지요."
  target: "Hasn't Donghwa come home yet? If he comes, let him eat with us."
- source: 동혁은 벌떡 일어나며 아우를 찾는다.
  target: Donghyeok sprang up and asked about his younger brother.
- source: "누가 아니. 수동이네 주막에서 대낮버텀 술을 처먹는다더니 여태 게 있는 게지. 뭐구 뭐 구 그 애가 맘을 못 잡어서 큰일났다. 글쎄 요샌 매일 장취로구나. 형두 형세가 부쳐서 허다만 공부를, 뭘 가지고 허겠다구 허고헌 날 성화를 받치니 온 살이 내릴 노릇이지. 큰말 강도 사네 작은아들이 대학굔가 졸업허구 와설라문 꺼덕대는 걸 보군, 버쩍 더 거염을 내 니 어쩌면 좋냐. 뱁새가 황새를 따르려다간 다리가 찢어지는 줄 모르구 덮어놓고 날뛰는구나.
  target: "Who says he hasn't? They said he's been drinking at Sudong's tavern since broad daylight, so he must still be there. That boy is in serious trouble; he just can't settle his mind. These days, he's drunk every single day. Your father is also in a difficult position; with our circumstances, how can he continue your studies? Yet that fellow keeps pestering him daily, saying he will do it—it's enough to make one's flesh melt away. Seeing the youngest son of the Kang family in Daemal, who graduated from university, strutting around has only made him more arrogant. What are we to do? He doesn't know that a wren trying to follow a stork will tear its legs, and just runs wild recklessly."
- source: "아닌게아니라 큰 걱정이에요. 암만 사정허듯 타일러두 점점 왜먹기만 허는걸. 성미가 여간 내기라야 손아귀에 너보지요."
  target: "It is indeed a great worry. No matter how much we plead and advise him, he only becomes more stubborn. His temper is so fierce that no one can get a handle on him."
- source: 하는데 호랑이도 제 말을 하면 온다고 동화가,
  target: Just as they were speaking, as the saying goes that the tiger appears when mentioned, Donghwa,
- source: "아아니, 이 집에선 바 밥들을 호 혼자 먹나?"
  target: "Hey, in this house, do people eat their meals all alone?"
- source: 하고 혀끝을 굴리지 못하고 비틀걸음을 치면서 들어온다. 눈동자까지 게게 풀린 것이 막걸리 사발이나 좋이 들이켠 모양이다. 평소에는 성이 난 사람처럼 뚜웅허니 남하고 수작 하기도 싫어하면서 술만 들어가면 불평이 쏟아진다. 근자에는 안하무인으로 술주정까지 함부로 해서 아버지조차,
  target: he said, stumbling in with his tongue unable to roll properly. His eyes were so glazed over that it seemed he had downed at least a few bowls of makgeolli. Usually, he acted as if angry, sullenly refusing to even converse with others, but once alcohol entered his system, complaints poured out. Recently, he had become so arrogant that he even engaged in drunken brawls without restraint, causing even his father to
- source: "저 자식은 하우불이야."
  target: "That kid is hopeless."
- source: 하고 그만 치지도외를 한다.
  target: he said, finally giving up and speaking to the wall.
- source: 동화는 썩은 연시 냄새 같은 술 냄새를 후― 하고 내뿜으며 방으로 뛰어들더니,
  target: Donghwa rushed into the room, exhaling a breath that smelled like rotten dried persimmons,
- source: "아 그래, 성님은 공부두 혼자 하구 밥꺼정 혼자 먹는 거유?"
  target: "Oh, so, Brother, you study alone and even eat your meals alone?"
- source: 하고 지게미가 낀 눈을 부라리며 생트집을 잡는다. 싹 깎은 머리가 자라서 불 밤송이처럼 일어났는데, 형만 못지않게 건강한 몸집은 올해 스물두 살이라면 누구나 곧이를 안 들을 만하게 우람스럽다.
  target: he said, glaring with eyes clouded by dregs as he picked a fight. His closely cropped hair had grown back, standing up like chestnut burrs, and his healthy build, no less robust than his older brother's, was so imposing at twenty-two that anyone would hesitate to cross him.
- source: "어서 밥이나 먹어라. 얘긴 술이 깨건 허구……."
  target: "Just eat your meal. We can talk once you've sobered up..."
- source: 아우의 성미를 건드렸다가는 마구 뚫린 창구멍으로 무슨 소리가 나올지 몰라서 형은 점잖이 타이른다.
  target: Not knowing what might come out of his mouth if he provoked his younger brother's temper, the older brother admonished him gently.
- source: "아아니, 내가 술이 취 취헌 줄 아우? 술두 안 먹는 성님은 도무지 대체 허는 게 뭐유? 밤낮 그 잘나 빠진 공동답이나 주무르구 콧물 흘리는 아이들을 뫄놓구서 언문 뒷다리나 가르치면 제일의 강산이란 말이요. 나 하나 공부두 못 허게 말끔 팔어 없애구서 큰소리가 무슨 큰소리 유. 어디 헐 말이 있건 해보."
  target: "No, do you think I'm drunk? Brother, who doesn't even drink, what on earth are you doing day and night? You say it's the best thing in the world to fiddle with that worn-out communal plow all day and teach the alphabet to snotty-nosed kids. You've sold me off completely so I can't even study, and what kind of big talk is that? Go on, say something if you have anything to say."
- source: 하면서 사뭇 형의 턱밑에다 삿대질을 하더니 이빨을 부르륵부르륵 갈다가,
  target: As he said this, he practically poked his finger under his brother's chin, then ground his teeth loudly before
- source: "아이구 ―--- "하고 주먹으로 앙가슴을 친다. 그러다가는,
  target: "Aigoo—!" he cried, striking his own chest with his fist. Then,
- source: "제에 길 헐, 두 번 못 올 청춘을 이 시굴 구석에서 썩여야 옳단 말이냐?"
  target: "Damn it, is it right to let the youth that comes only once rot away in this corner of the countryside?"
- source: 하고 벽이 무너져라고 걷어차며 소리를 버럭버럭 지르더니 그만 넉장거리로 자빠져 버린다.
  target: he shouted, kicking the wall as if to collapse it, and then collapsed flat on his back.
- source: 동혁은 아랫입술을 지그시 깨물고 앉아서 아우의 폭백을 받았다. 금세 드르렁드르렁 코를 골기 시작하는 동화의 머리를 들고, 목침을 베어 주고는 뱃속이 몹시 괴로운 듯 눈살을 잔뜩 찌푸린 얼굴을 물끄러미 들여다보려니까, 속도 상하고 식곤증이 나서 팔베개를 하고 그 곁에 누웠는데,
  target: Donghyeok sat biting his lower lip, enduring his younger brother's outburst. He lifted Donghwa's head, who had already begun to snore loudly, placed a wooden pillow beneath it, and gazed intently at his furrowed brow, which looked as though his stomach was in great pain. Feeling upset and drowsy from the meal, Donghyeok rested his head on his arm and lay down beside him.
- source: "편지 받우―--- 박동혁이 있소?"
  target: "Letter delivery! Is Park Donghyeok here?"
- source: 하는 소리가 싸리문 밖에서 유난히 크게 들렸다.
  target: The voice was heard unusually loudly from outside the brushwood gate.
- source: 동혁은 벌떡 일어나 고무신짝을 끌며 황급히 밖으로 나갔다.
  target: Donghyeok jumped up, dragged on his rubber shoes, and hurried outside.
- source: 편지는 영신에게서 온 것이었다. 동혁이가 학교를 그만두고 내려올 때에 정거장에서 굳은 악수로 작별을 한 뒤에, 올봄까지 오고 간 편지가 조그만 손가방으로 하나는 가득 찼으리라.
  target: The letter was from Yeongsin. After bidding farewell with a firm handshake at the station when Donghyeok quit school and came down to the countryside, enough letters had been exchanged between them by this spring to fill a small handbag.
- source: 그 후 한 사람은 고향인 한곡리로, 한 사람은 기독교청년회연합회 농촌사업부의 특파원 격으로 경기 땅이지만 모든 문화시설과는 완전히 격리된 청석골〔靑石洞〕이란 두메 구석으로 내려가서 일터를 잡은 뒤에는 서로 만날 기회가 없었다. 한가히 찾아다닐 시간과 여비까지도 없었거니와, 피차에 사업의 기초가 어느 정도까지 잡히기 전에는 만나지 말자는 언약도 있었던 것이다.
  target: After that, one returned to his hometown of Hankok-ri, while the other, serving as a special correspondent for the Rural Affairs Department of the YMCA, settled in Cheongseokgol [靑石洞], a remote hamlet in Gyeonggi Province completely isolated from all cultural facilities. Once they had established their respective work sites, they had no opportunity to meet. Not only did they lack the leisure time and travel funds to visit each other, but they had also made a pact not to meet until the foundations of their respective endeavors were firmly laid.
- source: 그러나, 그 대신 삼 전짜리 우표가 두 장 혹은 석 장씩 붙은 편지가 일주일에 한 번 열흘에 한 번씩은 거르지 않고 내왕을 하였다.
  target: However, in exchange, letters bearing two or three three-jeon stamps were exchanged without fail once a week or once every ten days.
- source: 그 편지의 내용이란, 젊은 남녀간에 흔히 있는 달콤한 사랑을 속삭인 것이 아니라, 순전히 사업 보고요, 의견교환이요, 또는 실제 운동의 고심담이었다. 서로 눈을 감고 앉았어도 한 곡리와 청석골의 형편과 무슨 일을 어떻게 해나가는 것이며, 심지어 틈틈이 무슨 책을 읽고 어떠한 느낌을 받았다는 등 머릿속까지 환하게 들여다보이도록 적어 보냈고 적혀 오고하였다.
  target: The content of these letters was not the sweet whispering of love common between young men and women, but purely reports on their work, exchanges of opinions, and accounts of the hardships faced in their actual movement. Even with their eyes closed, they could vividly see into each other's minds, as the letters described the conditions in Hangok-ri and Cheongseokgol, how they were carrying out their tasks, and even what books they read in their spare time and what impressions they gained.
- source: 그러면서도 피차에 사사로운 생활이나 신변에 관한 일은 단 한 줄도 비치지 않았다. 그러던 터에 오늘은 편지를 뜯어 보고 동혁은 적지 않이 놀랐다.
  target: Yet, not a single line was devoted to personal life or matters concerning their immediate surroundings. Given this, Donghyeok was quite surprised when he opened today's letter.
- source: ……건강에는 자신이 있었건만, 그 동안 과로한 탓인지 몸이 매우 쇠약해졌어요. 더 참다가는 큰 병이 날 것만 같은데요, 단 며칠 동안이나마 쉬고는 싶어도, 성한 때와 달러 어머니한테 도 가기는 싫고요, 잠시 쉬는 동안이라도 무의미하게 시간을 보내고 싶지는 않습니다. 그래서 생각다 못해, 동혁 씨가 계신 한곡리로 가서 얼마 동안 바닷바람이나 쏘이 다가올까 합니다. 백문이 불여일견이라고, 당신이 착수하신 사업을 직접 보고(결단코 시찰은 아니지만……) 많이 배워 가지고 오려고 합니다.
